heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 91–660, § 584 Stat. 1969Jan. 8, 1971
label: 450gg to 450gg–3 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 91–660, § 584 Stat. 1969Jan. 8, 1971
notes: Sections, , §§ 1–4, , provided for establishment of the Pensacola National Monument, maintenance of a museum for relics and records of Pensacola and its harbor defenses, and the transfer of title to the land and jurisdiction of the area to the State of Florida, upon determination by Secretary of the Interior that the area would be more suitably administered as a State historical park.act July 2, 1948, ch. 80662 Stat. 1220
amendments: Sections, , §§ 1–4, , provided for establishment of the Pensacola National Monument, maintenance of a museum for relics and records of Pensacola and its harbor defenses, and the transfer of title to the land and jurisdiction of the area to the State of Florida, upon determination by Secretary of the Interior that the area would be more suitably administered as a State historical park.act July 2, 1948, ch. 80662 Stat. 1220
